title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 37.1093 - Record of expenditures — downloadable information
text:
37.1093.  Record of expenditures — downloadable information. — The Missouri local government expenditure database shall provide:
  (1)  A record of all expenditures; and
  (2)  The ability to download information.
(L. 2021 H.B. 271)
